'''Muugrah''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was closer to the fringe of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] than it was to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]]. Its capital was [[Slaibo]], which was close to [[Squarn's Junkyard]]. It was a planet of open grasslands inhabited by [[Prospector/Legends|prospectors]] and ranchers.
